name: AccountSettings
description: Proton settings that are used for multiple services in the Amazon Web Services account.

allOf.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role that Proton uses for provisioning pipelines. Proton assumes this role for CodeBuild-based provisioning.

The linked repository for pipeline provisioning. Required if you have environments configured for self-managed provisioning with services that include pipelines. A linked repository is a repository that has been registered with Proton. For more information, see CreateRepository.

The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role you want to use for provisioning pipelines. Assumed by Proton for Amazon Web Services-managed provisioning, and by customer-owned automation for self-managed provisioning.
